CODE.item: loop at LT_LEARNACT into LS_LEARNACT where pernr = WTAB2-pernr.
loop at LT_PCIDP_HISTO into LS_PCIDP_HISTO where pernr = WTAB2-pernr.
loop at LT_HISTO_POSICIO into LS_HISTO_POSICIO where pernr = WTAB2-pernr.
** REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ',' in LS_HISTO_POSICIO-SUELDO WITH '.'.
*** REPLACE all OCCURRENCES OF ',' in G_BETRG with ' '.
